targeted_secret_scan.note: allowed hits are synthetic test fixtures or packaging marker strings; credential values were not output

secret_scan.command: rg -n --glob !*.env --glob !*.env.* --glob !**/venv/** --glob !**/.venv/** --glob !**/*.zip --glob !**/archives/** (sk-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}|xox[baprs]-[A-Za-z0-9-]{20,}|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ADOBE_ACCESS_TOKEN\s*=\s*[^\s]+|CLIENT_SECRET\s*=\s*[^\s]+) dashagent scripts tests outputs/reports outputs/eval_results_strict.json
